repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All three selected memories address compile-time Shape/StorageShape conversion errors on GetInputShape() in op_host code, which is the exact error class in the current repair (GetOriginShape missing on Shape). Memory ddf7fbd3-8a3b-46ad-a77c-260ac91db646 mentions 'no member named GetOriginShape' and shape pointer conversion; cd8066f0-7e8c-4350-b439-2d77be28d0f8 and 7340946f-9a7f-4450-89ca-f627a85315be show fixes for similar 'cannot convert' errors between StorageShape and Shape. These provide concrete examples of how to correctly access shape dimensions (e.g., using GetShape() or proper casting) for the InferShape function, directly applicable to the current 'no member named GetOriginShape' failure.
